title: ORGANIC GARDEN PROGRAM - 211info
text: EUGENE MAIN OFFICE ORGANIC GARDEN PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides access to a community garden. 195 W 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted, primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Email (541) 687-6227 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 687-6227 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information, assignment of garden plot is through a waitlist FEES: Varies DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On 5th Avenue between Adams Street and Blair Boulevard. Lane Transit District (LTD) bus stop one block from location. Services: Community Gardening * Hispanic/Latino Community Community Gardening * Immigrants Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - MENTAL HEALTH CARE FOOD - MOBILE FOOD PANTY AND BENEFITS ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - OHP HEALTH-RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HUMAN SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE MAIN OFFICE
